While these guidelines don't directly control rankings, they influence the algorithms that do. For medical practices, understanding these guidelines is essential for AI visibility."}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Why YMYL Content Requires Extra Care"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"YMYL (Your Money or Your Life) content—including medical information—faces stricter standards. Google considers this content \"potentially impacting the future happiness, health, or financial stability of users.\" This means your practice's content must meet elevated standards."}],["$","h3",null,{"children":"Key YMYL Requirements:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Expertise:"}]," Content must be written by qualified professionals"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Accuracy:"}]," Facts must be verifiable and sourced"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Trustworthiness:"}]," Site must demonstrate credibility"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency:"}]," Clear author credentials and citations"]}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"E-E-A-T for Medical Practices"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) forms the foundation of Google's quality assessment. For aesthetic medical practices, demonstrating these qualities is critical."}],["$","h3",null,{"children":"How to Build E-E-A-T:"}],["$","ol",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Experience:"}]," Share first-hand patient experiences, before/after results, and real case studies."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Expertise:"}]," Highlight physician credentials, board certifications, training."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Authoritativeness:"}]," Build citations from other medical authorities."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Trustworthiness:"}]," Maintain consistent business information, display real patient reviews."]}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Action Checklist for Compliance"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-navy-light p-6 rounded-xl my-8","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"mb-4","children":"Technical Requirements:"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"space-y-2","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"✅ Add author bio pages with credentials"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"✅ Implement Schema markup for medical professionals"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"✅ Link to authoritative medical sources"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"✅ Display licensing and certification information"}]]}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Conclusion"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Understanding and implementing Google's Quality Guidelines is about providing genuine value to potential patients.
